description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Update Default Keybindings that retrieves the default keybindings JSON of the latest stable version of VS Code across different OSs. The workflow should run every 12 hours, on push to master branch, and on workflow dispatch. It should use a matrix strategy to run on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest with Node.js 16.x, and then update keybindings files and create a PR if changes are detected.
